prompt: A ground-truth label map of a cross-section of human tissue, labeling muscle, fat, bone, and connective tissue.
prompt_refined: Generate a ground-truth label map of a human tissue cross-section. This map must distinctly segment and color-code four specific tissue types: muscle, fat, bone, and connective tissue. Each tissue type should be represented by a unique, solid color, ensuring clear boundaries and precise anatomical labeling.
objects: muscle tissue represented by a unique solid color
fat tissue represented by a unique solid color
bone tissue represented by a unique solid color
connective tissue represented by a unique solid color
